description: Infer the environmental phase phi*(t) from the observable zeitgeber channels in schedule.csv. phi* is defined by the imposed 24.0 h clock and is independent of any model; it is never an input. Score with score.py. Do NOT read this file inside your predictor.
phase_convention: radians in [0, 2*pi); forward clock; target_phase = 2*pi*((t - shift)%24)/24
